description: A variable-distance analytic chamfer along a plane/plane edge (setback tapering 0.4 -> 1.0), plus a setback vertex blend filling the 3-sided corner where three fillet bands meet (3 G1 corner sub-patches). Shown as a face-set; each surface is exact geometry.
name: n4_chamfer_vertex_blend
title: Chamfered edge + vertex-blended corner
